title.ko: 화학적 또는 물리적 특성 결정에 의한 재료의 조사 또는 분석 (효소 또는 미생물을 포함하는 면역분석 이외의 측정, 시험 장치 또는 공정 C12M, C12Q)
title.en: INVESTIGATING OR ANALYSING MATERIALS BY DETERMINING THEIR CHEMICAL OR PHYSICAL PROPERTIES (measuring or testing apparatus or processes other than immunoassay, involving enzymes or microorganisms C12M, C12Q)

definition.ko: 샘플링, 조제 G01N1/00 조사 대상의 성질에 의해 특징이 있는 조사 또는 분석 기계적 강도; 밀도; 유동 G01N3/00; G01N9/00; G01N11/00 표면 또는 경계효과; 입자의 특성, 침투력; 마찰, 점착력 G01N13/00; G01N15/00; G01N19/00 주위환경의 작용에 대한 저항력 G01N17/00 사용하는 방법에 의해 특징 지워지는 조사 또는 분석 중량측정; 기체의 압력 또는 체적의 측정; 기계적 G01N5/00; G01N7/00; G01N19/00 광학적; 마이크로파에 의한 것; 방사선에 의한 것 G01N21/00; G01N22/00; G01N23/00 자기공명 또는 다른 스핀효과 G01N24/00 열적; 전기적, 전기화학적, 자기적; 음향적 G01N25/00; G01N27/00; G01N29/00 성분분리에 의한 것; 화학적 방법의 이용에 의한 것 G01N30/00; G01N31/00 조사되는 재료에 특징이 있는 기타 조사 또는 분석 G01N33/00 면역 분석 G01N33/53 자동 분석 G01N35/00 이전 그룹에 포함되지 않는 세부 G01N37/00

title.ko: 샘플링; 조사용 표본의 조제(자동분석을 위한 재료의 취급(handling) G01N 35/00)
title.en: Sampling; Preparing specimens for investigation (handling materials for automatic analysis G01N0035000000)

title.ko: 시료를 꺼내기 위한 장치
title.en: Devices for withdrawing samples
in the solid state, e.g. by cutting
providing a thin slice, e.g. microtome
involving an extracting tool, e.g. core bit

title.ko: 액체 또는 유동상의 것
title.en: in the liquid or fluent state
Dippers; Dredgers
Suction devices, e.g. pumps; Ejector devices

title.ko: 다수의 레벨로 취급 가능한 것(G01N 1/12, G01N 1/14가 우선)
title.en: with provision for intake at several levels (G01N0001120000, G01N0001140000 take precedence)

title.ko: 시료를 분할할 수 있는 것(G01N 1/12, G01N 1/14가 우선; 크로마토그래프용 프랙션-포집(fraction-collection)제직 B01D 15/08)
title.en: with provision for splitting samples into portions (G01N0001120000, G01N0001140000 take precedence;fraction-collection apparatus for chromatography B01D0015080000)

title.ko: 유동하는 또는 낙하하는 재료를 위한 것(G01N 1/12, G01N 1/14가 우선)
title.en: for flowing or falling materials (G01N0001120000, G01N0001140000 take precedence)
in the gaseous state
Suction devices
with provision for intake from several spaces

title.ko: 조사용 표본의 조제(현미경의 슬라이드에의 표본의 부착 G02B 21/34; 전자현미경에서 분석해야 할 물체 또는 시료를 지지하기 위한 수단 H01J 37/20)
title.en: Preparing specimens for investigation (mounting specimens on microscopic slides G02B0021340000;means for supporting the objects or the materials to be analysed in electron microscopes H01J0037200000)
Staining; Impregnating
Apparatus therefor
Polishing; Etching
Purifying; Cleaning
Embedding or analogous mounting of samples
Diluting, dispersing or mixing samples
Concentrating samples
Low-temperature sample treatment, e.g. cryofixation
Sample treatment involving radiation, e.g. heat

title.ko: 기계적 응력 인가에 의한 고체재료의 강도의 조사
title.en: Investigating strength properties of solid materials by application of mechanical stress

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 재료의 응력의 부가가 탄성한계 이하의 경우 뿐만 아니라, 탄성한계를 넘는 경우, 예. 파괴할 때, 까지도 포함한다

title.en: Details
Chucks
Special adaptations of indicating or recording means

title.ko: 안정된 장력 또는 압축력에 의한 것(G01N 3/28이 우선)
title.en: by applying steady tensile or compressive forces (G01N0003280000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 공기압 또는 유압에 의한 것(G01N 3/18이 우선)
title.en: generated by pneumatic or hydraulic pressure (G01N0003180000 takes precedence)
Pressure-testing

title.ko: 무거운 것에 의해 생기는 것, 예. 진자; 용수철의 신장력에 의한 것(G01N 3/18이 우선)
title.en: generated by dead weight, e.g. pendulum; generated by spring tension (G01N0003180000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 톱니바퀴 장치를 통해 적용되는 것(G01N 3/18이 우선)
title.en: applied through gearing (G01N0003180000 takes precedence)
Performing tests at high or low temperatures

title.ko: 일정한 절곡력(bending force)의 적용에 의한 것(G01N 3/26, G01N 3/28이 우선)
title.en: by applying steady bending forces (G01N0003260000, G01N0003280000 take precedence)

title.ko: 일정한 비트는 힘의 적용에 의한 것(G01N 3/26, G01N 3/28이 우선)
title.en: by applying steady torsional forces (G01N0003260000, G01N0003280000 take precedence)

title.ko: 일정한 전단력 적용에 의한 것(G01N 3/26, G01N 3/28이 우선)
title.en: by applying steady shearing forces (G01N0003260000, G01N0003280000 take precedence)
Investigating twisting or coiling properties
Investigating ductility, e.g. suitability of sheet metal for deep-drawing or spinning

title.ko: 단충격력의 적용에 의한 것(충격하중하의 자국의 조사 G01N 3/48)
title.en: by applying a single impulsive force (investigating hardness by performing impressions under impulsive load G01N0003480000)
generated only by free-falling weight
generated by a compressed or tensile-stressed spring; generated by pneumatic or hydraulic means
generated by a rotating fly-wheel
generated by explosives
generated by electromagnetic means
by applying repeated or pulsating forces
generated by mechanical means, e.g. hammer blows
generated by pneumatic or hydraulic means
generated by electromagnetic means

title.ko: 경도 또는 반발경도의 조사
title.en: Investigating hardness or rebound hardness

title.ko: 안정된 하중하에서의 압자(indentor) , 예. 구, 피라미드가 형성하는 압흔에 의한 것(G01N 3/54가 우선)
title.en: by performing impressions under a steady load by indentors, e.g. sphere, pyramid (G01N0003540000 takes precedence)
the indentors being put under a minor load and a subsequent major load, i.e. Rockwell system
the indentors performing a scratching movement

title.ko: 충격하중의 것으로서 압자(indentor), 예. 낙하구, 에 의한 충격하중으로 압역을 형성하는 것(G01N 3/54가 우선)
title.en: by performing impressions under impulsive load by indentors, e.g. falling ball (G01N0003540000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 구름(rolling) 마찰의 측정에 의한 것, 예. 요동 진자에 의한 것(G01N 3/54가 우선)
title.en: by measuring rolling friction, e.g. by rocking pendulum (G01N0003540000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 충격체의 튀어 오르는 양의 측정에 의한 것(G01N 3/54가 우선)
title.en: by measuring extent of rebound of a striking body (G01N0003540000 takes precedence)
Performing tests at high or low temperatures
Investigating resistance to wear or abrasion
Investigating machinability by cutting tools; Investigating the cutting ability of tools
Investigating resistance of materials, e.g. refractory materials, to rapid heat changes
Manufacturing, calibrating, or repairing devices used in investigations covered by the preceding subgroups

title.ko: 중량측정에 의한 재료분석, 예. 기체 또는 액체에서 분리된 소립자의 중량측정에 의한 것(G01N 9/00이 우선)
title.en: Analysing materials by weighing, e.g. weighing small particles separated from a gas or liquid (G01N0009000000 takes precedence)
by absorbing or adsorbing components of a material and determining change of weight of the adsorbent, e.g. determining moisture content
by removing a component, e.g. by evaporation, and weighing the remainder
Analysing materials by measuring the pressure or volume of a gas or vapour
by absorption, adsorption, or combustion of components and measurement of the change in pressure or volume of the remainder
by absorption or adsorption alone
by combustion alone
by combustion followed by absorption or adsorption of the combustion products
by allowing diffusion of components through a porous wall and measuring a pressure or volume difference
the diffusion being followed by combustion or catalytic oxidation
by allowing the material to emit a gas or vapour, e.g. water vapour, and measuring a pressure or volume difference
by heating the material
by allowing the material to react
the reaction being fermentation
of dough

title.ko: 재료의 비중 또는 밀도의 조사 비중 또는 밀도의 측정에 의한 재료분석
title.en: Investigating density or specific gravity of materials; Analysing materials by determining density or specific gravity
by measuring weight of a known volume
of fluids
with continuous circulation through a pivotally-supported member
by measuring buoyant force of solid materials by weighing both in air and in a liquid
by observing bodies wholly or partially immersed in fluid materials
by observing the depth of immersion of the bodies, e.g. hydrometers
the body being built into a container
the body being pivoted
Special adaptations for indicating, recording, or control
by balancing the weight of the bodies
with continuous circulation of the fluid
by observing the transmission of wave or particle radiation through the material
by measuring pressure differences
by measuring the blowing pressure of gas bubbles escaping from nozzles at different depths in a liquid
by using centrifugal effects
by using flow properties of fluids, e.g. flow through tubes or apertures
by using elements moving through the fluid, e.g. vane

title.ko: 비중 또는 밀도의 측정에 의한 재료의 분석, 예. 수분의 측정(측정 방법 G01N 9/02에서 G01N 9/32)
title.en: Analysing materials by measuring the density or specific gravity, e.g. determining quantity of moisture (methods of measurement G01N0009020000-G01N0009320000)

title.ko: 재료의 유동성 조사, 예. 점도 또는 가소성; 유동성 측정에 의한 재료 분석
title.en: Investigating flow properties of materials, e.g. viscosity or plasticity; Analysing materials by determining flow properties
by measuring flow of the material
through a restricted passage, e.g. tube, aperture
by timing the outflow of a known quantity
by measuring pressure required to produce a known flow

title.ko: 재료 내에서 물체를 작동시키는 것
title.en: by moving a body within the material

title.ko: 물체의 상승 또는 낙하속도의 측정에 의한 것; 쐐기형의 게이지를 끼워 넣은 측정에 의한 것(G01N 11/16이 우선)
title.en: by measuring rising or falling speed of the body; by measuring penetration of wedged gauges (G01N0011160000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 회전체, 예. 날개, 의 이용에 의한 것(G01N 11/16이 우선)
title.en: by using rotary bodies, e.g. vane (G01N0011160000 takes precedence)
by measuring damping effect upon oscillatory body

title.ko: 표면 또는 경계효과, 예. 습윤력 등의 조사; 확산효과의 조사; 표면, 경계 또는 확산효과의 측정에 의한 재료의 분석(스캐닝 프로브 기술 또는 장치 G01Q)
title.en: Investigating surface or boundary effects, e.g. wetting power; Investigating diffusion effects; Analysing materials by determining surface, boundary, or diffusion effects (scanning-probe techniques or apparatus G01Q)
Investigating surface tension of liquids
Investigating osmotic effects

title.ko: 입자의 특성 조사; 다공성 물질의 투과성, 기공 부피 또는 표면적 조사
title.en: Investigating characteristics of particles; Investigating permeability, pore-volume or surface-area of porous materials

title.ko: 생물적 세포에 특히 적합한 것, 예. 혈액 세포 (혈액 내 입자 현탁액의 침강 조사 G01N15/05)
title.en: specially adapted for biological cells, e.g. blood cells (investigating sedimentation of particle suspensions in blood G01N0015050000)

title.ko: 입자 크기 또는 크기 분포 조사(삼투압 측정 G01N7/10; 입자 현탁액의 침강 조사 G01N15/04; 개별 입자 조사 G01N15/10)
title.en: Investigating particle size or size distribution  (by measuring osmotic pressure G01N0007100000; investigating sedimentation of particle suspensions G01N0015040000; investigating individual particles G01N0015100000)
by optical means
using imaging; using holography
Investigating sedimentation of particle suspensions
in blood

title.ko: 입자 현탁액의 농도 조사(G01N5/00 계량; 입자 현탁액 침강 조사 G01N15/04; 개별 입자 조사 G01N15/10)
title.en: Investigating concentration of particle suspensions  (by weighing G01N0005000000; investigating sedimentation of particle suspensions G01N0015040000;investigating individual particles G01N0015100000)
by optical means
Investigating permeability, pore volume, or surface area of porous materials
Investigating individual particles
by measuring electrical or magnetic effects
by observing changes in resistance or impedance across apertures when traversed by individual particles, e.g. by using the Coulter principle
Details pertaining to apertures
Optical investigation techniques, e.g. flow cytometry
Handling flow, e.g. hydrodynamic focusing
Handling samples, e.g. injecting samples
Signal processing
using image recognition
Optical arrangements
specially adapted for sorting particles, e.g. by their size or optical properties
within droplets

title.ko: 기후, 부식 또는 광에 대한 재료의 내구성 조사
title.en: Investigating resistance of materials to the weather, to corrosion or to light

title.ko: 풍화, 부식 또는 부식 방지 측정을 위한 전기화학적 측정 시스템 (G01N17/04가 우선)
title.en: Electrochemical measuring systems for weathering, corrosion or corrosion-protection measurement (G01N0017040000 takes precedence)
Corrosion probes

title.ko: 기계적 방법에 의한 재료조사(G01N 3/00 ～ G01N 17/00이 우선)
title.en: Investigating materials by mechanical methods (G01N0003000000-G01N0017000000 take precedence)
Measuring coefficient of friction between materials
Measuring adhesive force between materials, e.g. of sealing tape, of coating
Investigating by removing material, e.g. spark-testing
Detecting presence of flaws or irregularities
Measuring moisture content, e.g. by measuring change in length of hygroscopic filament; Hygrometers

title.ko: 광학적 수단, 즉 서브밀리미터파, 가시광선, 또는 자외선을 이용하여 재료의 조사 또는 분석 (G01N 3/00 - G01N 19/00이 우선)
title.en: Investigating or analysing materials by the use of optical means, i.e. using sub-millimetre waves, infrared, visible or ultraviolet light  (G01N0003000000-G01N0019000000 take precedence)

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 빛 그 자체의 분광특성의 조사 또는 광과의 간섭이 알려진 또는 중요하지 않은 분광특성이 검출되는 재료의 특성 측정을 포함하지 않는다. 이 주제는 G01J3/00에 포함된다

title.ko: 광학적 조사를 쉽게 하기 위한 배치 또는 장치
title.en: Arrangements or apparatus for facilitating the optical investigation

title.ko: 큐벳(Cuvette) 구조
title.en: Cuvette constructions

title.ko: 큐벳을 통한 흐름(G01N 21/09 우선)
title.en: Flow-through cuvettes (G01N0021090000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 원심분리형 큐벳(G01N 21/09 우선)
title.en: Centrifugal type cuvettes (G01N0021090000 takes precedence)
adapted to resist hostile environments or corrosive or abrasive materials
Filling or emptying of cuvettes
Moving of cuvettes or solid samples to or from the investigating station
Preventing contamination of the components of the optical system or obstruction of the light path

title.ko: 조사될 재료의 특성에 따라 입사광이 변조되는 시스템(조사되는 재료가 광학적으로 여기되어 입사광의 파장에 변화를 일으키는 시스템 G01N 21/63)
title.en: Systems in which incident light is modified in accordance with the properties of the material investigated (where the material investigated is optically excited causing a change in wavelength of the incident light G01N0021630000)
Dichroism

title.ko: 편광에 영향을 미치는 특성(G01N 21/19가 우선)
title.en: Polarisation-affecting properties (G01N0021190000 takes precedence)
Bi-refringence

title.ko: 색; 스펙트럼특성, 즉 둘 또는 그이상의 파장 혹은 파장대에 있어서 재료가 빛에 주는 효과의 비교
title.en: Colour; Spectral properties, i.e. comparison of effect of material on the light at two or more different wavelengths or wavelength bands

title.ko: 광전검출기의 이용(G01N 21/31이 우선)
title.en: using photo-electric detection (G01N0021310000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 시각검지의 이용(G01N 21/31이 우선)
title.en: using visual detection (G01N0021310000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 특정한 원소 또는 분자에 대한 파장특성에 있어서의 재료의 상대적 효과 조사, 예. 원자흡광분광
title.en: Investigating relative effect of material at wavelengths characteristic of specific elements or molecules, e.g. atomic absorption spectrometry

title.ko: 자외선을 이용하는 것(G01N 21/39가 우선)
title.en: using ultraviolet light (G01N0021390000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 적외선을 이용하는 것 (G01N 21/39가 우선)
title.en: using infrared light (G01N0021390000 takes precedence)
for analysing gases, e.g. multi-gas analysis
Devices using gas filter correlation techniques; Devices using gas pressure modulation techniques
for determining moisture content
in sheets, e.g. in paper
for analysing solids; Preparation of samples therefor
for analysing liquids, e.g. polluted water
using far infrared light; using Terahertz radiation
by Terahertz time domain spectroscopy [THz-TDS]
using near infrared light
using pneumatic detection
using tunable lasers

title.ko: 굴절률; 위상에 영향을 주는 성질, 예. 광로의 길이(G01N 21/21이 우선)
title.en: Refractivity; Phase-affecting properties, e.g. optical path length (G01N0021210000 takes precedence)
by measuring critical angle
using interferometric methods; using Schlieren methods

title.ko: 산란, 즉 확산 반사(G01N 21/25, G01N 21/41이 우선)
title.en: Scattering, i.e. diffuse reflection (G01N0021250000, G01N0021410000 take precedence)

title.ko: 물체내부 또는 유체내부에서
title.en: within a body or fluid

title.ko: 용기의 내부, 예. 앰풀(ampoule)내(G01N 21/53 우선)
title.en: inside a container, e.g. in an ampoule (G01N0021530000 takes precedence)
within a flowing fluid, e.g. smoke
Specular reflectivity
Attenuated total reflection
Measuring gloss

title.ko: 투과율(21/25가 우선)
title.en: Transmissivity (G01N0021250000 takes precedence)
Non-dispersive gas analysers
Systems in which the material investigated is excited whereby it emits light or causes a change in wavelength of the incident light
optically excited
Fluorescence; Phosphorescence
Raman scattering
electrically excited, e.g. electroluminescence
using electric arcs or discharges
using high frequency electric fields
specially adapted for fluids
mechanically excited, e.g. triboluminescence
thermally excited
using flame burners
using plasma burners or torches
using flameless atomising, e.g. graphite furnaces

title.ko: 재료가 화학반응을 받고 그 반응의 진행 또는 결과가 조사되는 시스템(재료가 불꽃 또는 플라즈마 중에서 연소되는 시스템 G01N 21/72, G01N 21/73)
title.en: Systems in which material is subjected to a chemical reaction, the progress or the result of the reaction being investigated (systems in which material is burnt in a flame or plasma G01N0021720000, G01N0021730000)
Chemiluminescence; Bioluminescence
by observing the effect on a chemical indicator
producing a change of colour
Photometric titration
Indicating pH value
Indicating humidity
producing a precipitate or turbidity
Turbidimetric titration

title.ko: 특수한 적용에 특히 적합한 시스템
title.en: Systems specially adapted for particular applications
Investigating moving fluids or granular solids

title.ko: 움직이고 있는 시이트의 조사(G01N 21/89가 우선)
title.en: Investigating moving sheets (G01N0021890000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 보석의 조사(G01N 21/88이 우선)
title.en: Investigating jewels (G01N0021880000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 결함, 상처 또는 오염의 존재조사
title.en: Investigating the presence of flaws, defects or contamination

title.ko: 움직이고 있는 재료 중에서, 예. 종이, 직물(G01N 21/90, G01N 21/91, G01N 21/94 이 우선)
title.en: in moving material, e.g. paper, textiles (G01N0021900000, G01N0021910000, G01N0021940000 take precedence)
characterised by the flaw, defect or object feature examined
Pinholes
Optical defects in or on transparent materials, e.g. distortion, surface flaws

title.en: Chemical analysis of biological material, e.g. blood, urine; Testing involving biospecific ligand binding methods; Immunological testing  (measuring or testing processes other than immunological involving enzymes or microorganisms, compositions or test papers therefor, processes of forming such compositions, condition responsive control in microbiological or enzymological processes C12Q)

definition.ko: 그룹 G01N 33/52-G01N 33/98 내에서, 상반되는 지시가 없는 한, 최후개소 우선규칙이 적용되며, 즉. 각 계층적 레벨에서, 최후의 적절한 개소에 분류한다

title.en: Use of compounds or compositions for colorimetric, spectrophotometric or fluorometric investigation, e.g. use of reagent paper
Immunoassay; Biospecific binding assay; Materials therefor
Production of immunochemical test materials
Production of labelled immunochemicals
with fluorescent label
with radioactive label
with enzyme label
with immune complex formed in liquid phase
with separation of immune complex from unbound antigen or antibody
by sorbent column, particles or resin strip
involving precipitating reagent
Double or second antibody
with steric inhibition or signal modification, e.g. fluorescent quenching
with an insoluble carrier for immobilising immunochemicals
the carrier being organic
Synthetic resin
as water suspendable particles
with antigen or antibody attached to the carrier via a bridging agent
Carbohydrates, e.g. dextran
with antigen or antibody entrapped within the carrier
the carrier being inorganic
Glass or silica
Metal or metal coated
the carrier being a biological cell or cell fragment, e.g. bacteria, yeast cells
Red blood cell
Fixed or stabilised red blood cell
using kinetic measurement, i.e. time rate of progress of an antigen-antibody interaction
using diffusion or migration of antigen or antibody
through a gel, e.g. Ouchterlony technique
Immunoelectrophoresis
involving antibody fragments
for pre-existing immune complex or autoimmune disease
using specific carrier or receptor proteins as ligand binding reagent
utilising isolate of tissue or organ as binding agent
for microorganisms, e.g. protozoa, bacteria, viruses
for venereal disease, e.g. syphilis, gonorrhoea, herpes
for enzymes or isoenzymes
for cancer
of the blood, e.g. leukaemia
of the skin, e.g. melanoma
of the breast
of the lungs
of the liver or pancreas
of the stomach or small intestine
of the large intestine, e.g. colon, rectum or anus
of the renal system, e.g. kidneys or ureters
of the ovaries
of the uterine cervix, uterine corpus or endometrium
of the prostate
for hepatitis
involving monoclonal antibodies
involving limulus lysate

title.ko: 표식물질을 함유하는 것(G01N 33/53 우선)
title.en: involving labelled substances (G01N0033530000 takes precedence)
involving radioactive labelled substances
involving urea
involving ketones
involving blood sugars, e.g. galactose
involving proteins, peptides or amino acids
involving creatine or creatinine
involving blood pigments, e.g. hemoglobin, bilirubin
involving hormones
Human chorionic gonadotropin
Thyroid gland hormones
involving blood groups or blood types
involving vitamins
involving inorganic compounds or pH
involving blood coagulating time
involving prostaglandins
involving iron binding capacity of blood
involving lipids, e.g. cholesterol
involving narcotics
involving blood or serum control standard
involving alcohol, e.g. ethanol in breath

title.ko: 그룹 1/00 ～ 33/00의 어느 1개로 분류되는 방법 또는 재료로 한정되지 않는 자동 분석; 그것을 위한 재료 취급
title.en: Automatic analysis not limited to methods or materials provided for in any single one of groups G01N0001000000-G01N0033000000; Handling materials therefor
using a plurality of sample containers moved by a conveyor system past one or more treatment or analysis stations
Details of the conveyor system
using a stream of discrete samples flowing along a tube system, e.g. flow injection analysis
Devices for transferring samples to, in, or from, the analysis apparatus, e.g. suction devices, injection devices
Details not covered by any other group of this subclass
